name: fe-review-agents
description: Skill-first frontend code review plugin with six isolated reviewers plus a synthesizer for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Frontend diff and file review with six isolated reviewers
interface.longDescription: Codex-native skill-first frontend review plugin. Review staged changes, custom git diff scopes, or a single file with six specialist reviewers and a synthesizer while preserving Claude Code slash-command compatibility.
